text.message: You know I gotta block you all game
Yeah I gave you a pass on the first one
it was the right move 3 devs in hand
Had to go there after the road to 9-12 was blocked
Social game unfortunately so double plow is pretty crazy
All good though. Black can win
Was the only move I had though with my hand
I mean you could’ve take a different spot
Or chatted and worked out a deal
that 4511 is really good for you
Wasn't anywhere near as good though
Black dude you’re way ahead lol
I’m not even close. All knights
Will be playing them on next couple turns
so that means black has the second mono
i think we have to test reds devs too
